Kas ta on lugupidav?<br/><br/>Muud asjad, mida meeles pidada:<br/><br/>Kas hambaarstil ja personalil on head suhtlemisoskused?<br/><br/>Kas patsiendid tunnevad end hambaarstile küsimusi esitades mugavalt?<br/><br/>Kas hambaarsti soovitusi/soovitusi saab usaldada?<br/><br/>Kas on olemas digitaalne röntgenikiirgus, mis vähendab kontoris tarbetut kiirgust?<br/><br/>Kas kontoris on arenenud tehnoloogiad, nagu laser, et leida õõnsusi, digitaalset röntgenikiirgus ja / või suusiseseid kaameraid, et tuvastada olemasolevaid probleeme suus?<br/><br/>Kas büroo tagab oma teenused, samuti edendab optimaalset hambatervist ja ei kohtle patsiente nagu kliente, kes tulevad ja lähevad?<br/><br/>Hambaarsti valimine väga madala reklaamihinna tõttu<br/><br/>Keegi ei hüppaks lennukist välja, kasutades odavat langevarju. Kui patsientidele meeldib oma hambaid säilitada, ei tohiks nad usaldada oma tervist hambaarstidele, kellel pole midagi erilist pakkuda, kuid soodushinnaga teenuseid.<br/><br/>Kolm põhjust, miks see võib tagasi tulla:<br/><br/>See on nagu lõksu astumine ja petmine, kui hambaarst pakub väga madalat hinda, ilma et paljastaks varjatud kulusid, kuni patsient istub hambaravi toolil.<br/><br/>Tavaliselt tähendab madal hind minimaalset hooldust, mis võib muuta patsiendi rohkem altid lagunemisele ja haigustele.<br/><br/>Enamasti saavad patsiendid halva ravi hambaarstilt, kellel puudub kogemus ja väljaõpe.<br/><br/>Miks usaldada odavat reklaami, mis võimaldab patsientidel kulutada rohkem kui tavaliselt soovitud või vajalike teenuste jaoks, kui nad saavad minna väljaõppinud ja kogenud hambaarstidele, kes mõtlevad, mis on nende patsientide jaoks parim.<br/><br/>Kui mõiste hambaravi tuleb meelde, inimesed võivad meenutada oma pere hambakliinikus, kus nad lähevad, et nende hambad puhastada ja kontrollida. Hambaarsti elukutse on aga palju suurem, kui nad arvavad, ja üldhambaarstid on vaid üks erialade uuring hambaarsti. Neile, kes soovivad rohkem teada teiste hambaarsti tüüpi, nad saavad jätkata lugemist.<br/><br/>Üldhambaarst<br/><br/>Iga pere hambaarst on üldhambaarst, kes regulaarselt hoolitseb suuõõne tervise tema / tema patsiendid. Enamik nende spetsialistide tööst hõlmab ennetavat suuhooldust, mis hõlmab regulaarset hambapuhastust, röntgenikiirte ja patsientide õpetamist suuhooldusest kodus. Üldhambaarstid vastutavad suuõõne hoolduse eest – näiteks hambakaariese ravimine kunstlike täidistega, lõhenenud või puuduvate hammaste ettevalmistamine ning valgendamise teenused. Nad ravivad suuõõne probleeme, mida arvatakse igemehaiguste ja igemepiiri all olevate juurte probleemide tõttu. Nad võivad muu hulgas juhendada patsiente trakside, suukaitsete ja valehammaste saamisel. Kuna üldhambaarst on tervishoiutöötaja, et inimesed kõige sagedamini näha, nad ka jälgida patsiendi suu, pea ja kaela tervise veendumaks, et ei ole probleeme.<br/><br/>Üldhambaarstid võivad ravida paljusid tingimusi ja võivad kogeda erihoolduselementide pakkumist. Nii saavad nad patsientidele anda teatud tüüpi hambaarstide soovitusi.<br/><br/>Ortodondi<br/><br/>Ortodontistid on tuntud traksid paigaldamise poolest, kuid nende hooldus läheb kaugemale. Üldiselt parandavad ortodondid ebaühtlasi hambaid, lõualuusid ja muid toetavaid näostruktuure kosmeetilisel ja funktsionaalsel eesmärgil. See tähendab, et nad parandavad inimeste hammustamist, kujundades kohandatud suulisi seadmeid - nagu traksid, kinnitusvahendid, selged hambapastad, suukaitse, näomaskid ja peakatted, et lahendada arenguprobleeme. Sellised seadmed töötavad aja jooksul, et parandada deformeerunud luu struktuuri ja hammaste vahekauguse probleeme.<br/><br/>Periodontist<br/><br/>Periodontiit keskendub igemetele ja periodontiit aitab diagnoosida, ravida ja ennetada erinevaid igemeprobleeme. See hõlmab äärmusliku igemevalu ja -põletiku ravi, äärmusliku igeme- või periodontaalhaiguse diagnoosimist ja ravi, hambaimplantaatide paigaldamist ja igemetele naha siirdamist. Üldiselt on parodontoloogid seotud kõigega, mis on seotud igemete ulatusliku tööga. Igemehaiguste ravi on suur osa parodontoloogiast. Seetõttu annavad parodontoloogid tavaliselt üldhambaarstidele nõu ennetus- ja raviplaanide kohta, mis sobivad patsiendi elustiiliga.<br/><br/>Endodontist<br/><br/>Hamba sisemine osa, mida tuntakse ka kui "pulp", on kaetud hamba kõva emailiga ja dentiini sisekihiga ning asub igemepiiri all. See on pehme, tundlike eluskoe koostisosade ja on osa hambast, millele endodontoloogid keskenduvad. Hambapulp võib saada vigastatud, mädanenud või paisunud trauma, vigastuse või lagunemise tõttu, nii et see tuleb kas eemaldada või ravida. Kui ravitakse ja säilitatakse, võib hammast hoida elus patsiendi suus. Kui seda ei saa enam säilitada, vajab see tavaliselt ravi, mida nimetatakse juurekanaliks, mis on kõige sagedamini teostatud protseduur, mida endodontoloogid teevad.<br/><br/>Enamikul inimestel kulub hambaarsti külastamiseks aastaid – ilmselt hirmu, rahapuuduse või hea hambaarstina olemise tõttu. Pole tähtis, mis põhjusel hambaarsti juurde kaks korda aastas minemine aitab neil oma naeratuse eest hästi hoolitseda.<br/><br/>Inimesed, kes pole aastaid hambaarsti külastanud, peaksid vaatama nimekirja "7 parimat põhjust hambaarsti külastamiseks", et julgustada neid enda eest paremini hoolitsema.<br/><br/>Ennetav hooldus regulaarselt säästab nii hambaid kui ka raha<br/><br/>Hambaprobleeme on lihtsam lahendada, kui nad on alles alustanud, enne kui nad halvenevad ja maksavad rohkem. Näiteks võib mõnesaja dollari eest fikseerida väikese õõnsuse, enne kui see muutub lagunemishambaks, mis nõuab kulukat juurekanalit ja krooni.<br/><br/>Tõsiste hingamisteede või halb hingeõhk<br/><br/>Aeg-ajalt võib püsivalt halb hingeõhk viidata tõsisemale probleemile. Halitoos võib tekkida suukuivuse, tubakatoodete ja ülejäägiga. Kuid see võib olla tingitud ka muudest terviseprobleemidest, nagu krooniline bronhiit, diabeet, neeru- või maksahaigus või sinusiit. Kui inimesed kannatavad halva hingeõhu all, peaksid nad kohe külastama oma hambaarsti.<br/><br/>Kuidas parandada aastate jooksul tekkinud kahju<br/><br/>On oluline, et inimesed harjata ja hambaniiti iga päev kogu oma elu. Vanemad inimesed, kuigi, on rohkem altid hambahaiguste nagu igemehaiguste ja naastude kogunemine. Lisaks on hammaste ja hammaste juure lagunemine vanemate täiskasvanute seas tavalisem, eriti kui neil on vanad täidised.<br/><br/>Säilita tervislik naeratus<br/><br/>Et hambad ja igemed jääksid parimasse seisukorda, on oluline harjata ja hambaniiti kodus, kuid tervisliku naeratuse saavutamiseks peaksid inimesed regulaarselt külastama oma hambaarsti. Hambaarst võib vabaneda hambakatu all igemejoone, samuti tühikud hammaste vahel, mis on raskesti kättesaadav, mida ei saa jõuda hambaharja. Lisaks hambaarst saab pakkuda hambaravi, et anda pikaajaline naastude kaitse.<br/><br/>Sellest on aastaid, kui ta viimati hambaarsti juures käis.<br/><br/>Kuigi hambad näevad välja head ja suuhügieen on suurepärane, on alati mõistlik külastada hambaarsti kaks korda aastas. Kuigi kõik hambad näevad välja hea, hambaarst võib avastada muid hambaravi probleeme. Regulaarsed kontrollid, testid ja röntgenikiired võivad säilitada terved hambad ja hoida neid pikka aega.<br/><br/>Kui igemed on verejooks<br/><br/>Kui kraanikausis on harjamise ajal verd, on kõige parem külastada hambaarsti. Kummid võivad veritseda ahvatleva harjamise tõttu. Kuid see võib olla tingitud ka igemete all olevast naastu kogunemisest. Kui jätta ravimata, naast võib põhjustada hammaste lagunemine ja igemehaigus. Veritsevad igemed võivad tähendada olemasolu igemehaigus, mis võib põhjustada hammaste kaotus.<br/><br/>Vältida hammaste kaotust<br/><br/>Igapäevased harjumused korralik harjamine ja hambaniit on niikuinii esmane, kõige tõhusam ja odav viis vältida hamba väljalangemist. Järgmine samm on külastada hambaarsti hambaravi kaks korda aastas. Professionaalse puhastamise, fluoriidiravi ja eksamitega kaasnev ennetav hambaravi on hammaste väljalangemise vältimiseks kriitilise tähtsusega. Regulaarsed külastused võivad aidata hambaarstil hambaprobleeme varakult kindlaks teha, enne kui need võivad halveneda.<br/><br/>Mõned on üsna abrasiivsed. Abrasiivid, mis võivad kahjustada hammaste struktuuri ja suurendada õõnsuse moodustumist.<br/><br/>Need sisaldavad kunstlikke valgendajaid nagu titaandioksiid, millel on teadaolevalt kahjulik mõju hammastele. Teie hambapasta ei pea olema valge.<br/><br/>Koostisosad<br/><br/>Selle retsepti jaoks on vaja ainult nelja koostisosa.<br/><br/>Esimene on kookosõli. Kookosõli on antibakteriaalne ja viirusevastane. Kasutage umbes tassi.<br/><br/>Järgmine koostisosa on 2-3 supilusikatäit söögisoodat. Küpsetussooda on leeliseline, mille pH väärtus on kuskil 9-11. See leelis neutraliseerib happelise toidu mõju, mida me kogu päeva sööme, nii et säästa häid baktereid, mida peame suus hoidma. Jah, seal on ka häid baktereid! Vältige eeterlike õlide kasutamist, millel on antibakteriaalsed omadused. Ka söögisooda on ainult veidi agressiivne, nii et see harjab hambaemaili kergelt, kahjustamata seda.<br/><br/>Kolmas koostisosa on ksülitool. See on looduslik taimne magusaine ja on teada, et vältida ja vähendada hammaste lagunemist ja aidata üldist suuõõne tervist. Ilma selle magusaine lisamine hambapasta saab maitse väga kibe ja väga soolane. Ärge lisage seda liiga palju. Ärge kasutage kunstlikke magusaineid, nagu naatriumsahhariin või sorbitool.<br/><br/>Neljas koostisosa on piparmünt või mürri ekstrakt, et anda oma hambapastale tüüpiline piparmündi maitse. Kasutage seda mõõdukalt, et see sobiks teie maitsega.<br/><br/>Ärge kasutage vesinikperoksiidi. Kuigi see valgendab hambaid. See loob vabad radikaalid, mis võivad vananeda igemed, keel ja pehmete kudede vooder sees seinad suus.<br/><br/>Haara pH riba ja testige oma pasta happelisust. Kui see on alla 7, lisage sellele veidi rohkem leelist. Liiga palju hapet võib põhjustada hammaste lagunemist.<br/><br/>Menetlus<br/><br/>Kui kasutate poolkõva kookosõli, siis tuleb see kõigepealt sulatada või pehmendada.<br/><br/>Sega kõik koostisosad üksteise järel, et moodustada paks pasta.<br/><br/>Hambapastat võib hoida torukotis või muul juhul mahutis ja seejärel vajadusel harja harjaste harjaste peale veidi lusikaga. Parem on kasutada iga pereliikme jaoks eraldi purke.<br/><br/>Sirged hambad on terved hambad. Nad aitavad teil säilitada täiuslik naeratus ja võlu maailma ümber lihtsalt. Sellised hambad, tour usalduse tase on alati üles ja oma välimust parandatakse. Kuid lugu on täiesti erinev, kui keegi on kõverad hambad või silmitsi viimist mured oma hambaid. Sellised hambad mitte ainult rikkuda ilu naeratus, lahjendades kuma välimus, vaid ka tuhm nägu võlusid. Nii loomulikult, nad on suur mõju oma aja kvaliteedi koos tuues ohtu hambaprobleeme tulevikus. Nad vajavad kohest ravi, et mitte kahjustada oma hambaid tervist enam.<br/><br/>Veelgi olulisem, mis tahes ebakõla hammaste vahel võib põhjustada lõualuu ja temporomandibulaarne liigesevalu. See on koht, kus sa pead nägema ortodondi ja otsida õiget ravi oma hamba joondamise probleem. Varem soovitasid sellised hambaarstid peaaegu alati patsientide joondamise probleemide raviks metallraamid. Sellised traksid on endiselt populaarsed, kuid metallist juhtmete ja sulgude kasutamine ei tee neid uue vanuse teismelistele ja täiskasvanutele. Sellised traksid on looduses nähtavad, nii et need paistavad suus, mis ei tundu esteetiliselt korrektne. Sel põhjusel on vaja süsteemi, mis ei ole suus nähtav.<br/><br/>Õnneks on nähtamatud traksid reaalsus ja nad on saanud hea alternatiiv traditsioonilistele metall traksid. Nad on vabad juhtmed ja sulgudes; pigem kasutatakse plastikust alignerid liigutada hambaid õige joondus. Nad on üsna keerukas süsteem, kus hambaarst kõigepealt võtta 3D muljed suu enne valmistamist joonlaud. Nad on loodud nii, et katta hambaid veel nähtamatuks. Samuti on need nihutid eemaldatavad, et nad lisaksid elukvaliteeti ja ei piiraks söömist ja harjamist mingil viisil. Nendega saate nautida elu parimana.<br/><br/>Lisaks sellele kahtlevad mõned inimesed plastide kasulikkuses joondustes, kuna nad arvavad, et metall annab hammastele rohkem jõudu ja elujõudu. Nad eksivad, sest kõva plasti kasutatakse hammastele surve avaldamiseks, et õiget kogust jõudu saaks rakendada periodontaalsetele sidemetele. See on siis, kui sidemed laienevad, muutes hambad lahti ja suunates need õigesse joondamisesse järk-järgult. Selliste traksid, see võtab vahel 9 kuni 15 kuud, et saada õige joondus, kuid mõnel juhul võib see võtta ka kaks aastat, et tulemus ilmub.<br/><br/>Nähtamatud joondujad on hea valik, kui tegemist on hammaste õige joondamisega ja näo ja naeratuse esteetika säilitamisega. Kuna need ei ole nähtavad nagu metall, on ebamugavustunne täiesti kadunud. Plus, sellised traksid on lihtne harjata või hambaniiti ümber, ja nad isegi ei takista nautida toiduvalikut. Seega saate konsulteerida koolitatud ortodondi ja teada detailid traksid ja nende kasulikkust hambaid. See aitab teil hõlpsasti oma probleeme lahendada.<br/><br/>Valged hambad on oluline mõju, kui esitate ennast. Sellepärast igaüks tahab valgemad hambad nendel päevadel. Lisaks hambaravi tervis on väga oluline ka. Tänu palju tooteid nagu hambapasta, see feat on nüüd mugav ülesanne saavutada. Kuid hiljuti kasutatakse hammaste valgendamiseks laialdaselt uut toodet, mida nimetatakse aktiivsöeks. Aga mis see on?<br/><br/>Mis on aktiivsüsi?<br/><br/>See on süsiniku vorm, mida töödeldakse, et oleks palju väikseid poore. Need väikesed poorid suurendavad süsiniku pindala, mis suurendab selliseid protsesse nagu adsorptsioon ja muud keemilised reaktsioonid. See suurendab süsiniku tundlikkust reaktsioonide suhtes, töötledes seda.<br/><br/>Kas me peaksime seda kasutama?<br/><br/>Jah, kindlasti. Väikestes annustes ei ole see meile kahjulik. Siiski tuleb säilitada ettevaatusabinõud.<br/><br/>Kasu söe hammaste valgendamine pulber<br/><br/>Hiljuti on suurenenud aktiivsöe kasutamine hammaste valgendamiseks. YouTube'is on palju artikleid ja tuhandeid videoid, mis arutavad sama teemat. Selle populaarsuse põhjuseks on see, et see saavutab tõhusaid tulemusi. Nii et uurime selle erinevaid eeliseid hammaste valgendamisel.<br/><br/>Valgendab hambaid<br/><br/>Aktiivsüsi on looduslik hammaste valgendaja. Igasugust plekki saab eemaldada selle pulbriga. Lisaks on aktiivsöe regulaarne kasutamine tõestanud hammaste valgendamist aja jooksul. Samuti reguleerib see teie igeme tervist. See võib valgendada hambaid ilma tundlikkuseta. Isegi inimesed, kellel on tundlikud hambad, võivad valida selle valgendamise lahenduse.<br/><br/>Hambaravi<br/><br/>Aktiivsüsi on suurepärane adsorbeeriv aine. Adsorptsioon on materjali õhukese kile hoidmine välispinnal. Mis see implantaadid meie puhul on, et see on väga hea adsorbeeriv aine ja see võib adsorbeerida hambakattu ja mikroskoopiline tidbits olemas hambaid. Mitte ainult ei see protsess tulemuseks valgemad hambad, vaid ka edendab hea hammaste tervist.<br/><br/>Tugevdab hambaid<br/><br/>Paljud aktiivsüsi turul on seotud erinevate healoomuliste mineraalidega, mida saab kasutada meie hammaste terviseks. Neid saab kasutada hammaste tervena ja tugevana hoidmiseks. Fluoriid hambapasta kasutatakse samal eesmärgil, kuid on ohtlik meile mitmel viisil. Kuid kasutades seda, teiselt poolt, on usaldusväärselt väga ohutu ja edendab üldist hamba tervist, mis on väga oluline tervisliku elu.<br/><br/>pH taseme reguleerimine<br/><br/>Veel üks oluline aktiivsöe kasutusala on see, et see reguleerib meie suu pH taset ja taastab selle optimaalse taseme, mis on vajalik tervislikuks eluks. Kui pH tase suus ei ole optimaalne arv, siis võib see vallandada bakterite kasvu, mis võib põhjustada palju probleeme, nagu hammaste lagunemine, õõnsused jne.<br/><br/>Seega, aktiivsüsi pakub palju kasu meie hambaid tervist. Mitte ainult ei valgendab hambaid, vaid ka edendab üldist hammaste tervist.<br/><br/>Meie arst nõu, et: "Vähese toitumise võib mõjutada teie immuunsüsteemi, suurendades teie vastuvõtlikkust paljudele haigustele ja infektsioonidele, sealhulgas periodontaalhaigus." Mõned harjumused, mis võivad kahjustada hambaid:<br/><br/>1. Kuumad joogid<br/><br/>Inimesed, kes sageli joovad kuuma jooke, on tavaliselt ebatervislikud hambad. Must tee ja kohv sisaldavad tanniine, mis määrivad hambaid ja loovad hambaemaili lõhedesse ja soontesse. Tanniinid mitte ainult ei määri hamba pinda, vaid meelitavad ligi ka lagunevaid baktereid.<br/><br/>Parem on tarbida sooja jooke mõõdukalt ja lisada piima, mis neutraliseerib happeid. Samuti aitab rohkem vett juua.<br/><br/>2. Mitte Floshing Mitte paljud inimesed teavad hammaste hambaniiti, sealhulgas need, kes pesevad usuliselt. "Floshing iga päev on üks parimaid asju, mida saate teha, et hoolitseda oma hambaid. See on ainus kõige olulisem tegur parodondihaiguste ennetamisel, mis mõjutab rohkem kui 50% täiskasvanutest. "<br/><br/>Flossing eemaldab tõhusalt hambakattu ja prahti, mis kleepuvad hammaste vahele ja igemetele. Flossing annab teile ka atraktiivse naeratuse, kuna see poleerib hammaste pinda ja isegi takistab halba hingeõhku.<br/><br/>3. Enneaegne harjamine Meile on alati õpetatud harjama pärast sööki, kuid see ei ole enam parim aeg harjamiseks. Meie arstide sõnul "Pärast kõrge happega toidu või jookide, nagu vein, kohv, tsitrusviljad ja karastusjoogid, loputage veega, et neutraliseerida happeid, kuid oodake tund enne hambapasta jõudmist."<br/><br/>Arst ütleb ka, et hammaste harjamine kohe pärast happeliste toitude ja gaseeritud jookide tarbimist võib põhjustada hammaste emaili erosiooni.<br/><br/>4. Üle-entusiastlik valgendamine Bleach valgendav aine on süüdlane. Žürii on ikka veel välja, kas valgendamine õõnestab hambaemaili, kuid see on üksmeelne, et liigne valgendamine suurendab hammaste tundlikkust.<br/><br/>Isegi kodus valgendamine ravi tuleks kasutada mõõdukalt; mõned valgendamine geelid ja hambapasta sisaldavad abrasiivseid aineid, mis suurendavad ka tundlikkust, mis põhjustab valu. Ja mõned viimased hoiatused: kunstlik valgendamine on oma piirid. Nii et kui sa vananevad, rohkem valgendamine ei kavatse teha oma hambaid valgemaks või suurendada oma naeratust.<br/><br/>Aga kuidas saab üks juua karastusjooke? Nii meie arst soovitab juua neid läbi kõrred. Ta soovitab ka loputada suud veega pärast ja närimine vähem nätsu vastu happed. Lõpuks peate ootama vähemalt tund aega enne harjamist.<br/><br/>6. Happeline toit Läbi selle nimekirja, oleme näinud, et lapsed on peamised süüdlased, mis mõjutavad hambaid ja sellest tulenevalt naeratus. Nii et ole ettevaatlik toidud, mis sisaldavad happeid.<br/><br/>"Kuigi sidrunid, greipfruudid ja tsitrusviljamahlad ei põhjusta otseselt õõnsusi, nagu karastusjoogid, sisaldavad nad happeid, mis põhjustavad hambaemaili erosiooni, nõrgestades hammast ja muutes selle lagunemiseks."<br/><br/>Aga kui teil on neid toite, loputage suud veega pärast seda, närige suhkrut vähem igemeid ja ärge kohe hambaharjale jõudke.<br/><br/>Kosmeetika hambaravi teenused ei tööta ainult luua ilus naeratus. Nad on oluline korrigeerimise tingimused, et paljud patsiendid võitlevad. Need tingimused ei muuda mitte ainult inimese välimust, vaid häirivad ka suu normaalseid funktsioone. Sellistel juhtudel ei otsi patsiendid mitte ainult oma välimust, vaid parandavad ka probleemi, millega nad võitlevad.<br/><br/>See tähendab, et on oluline mõista, kuidas kosmeetiline hambaravi on teie jaoks oluline.<br/><br/>Ebamugavustunne<br/><br/>Võttes vale hammustada tekib siis, kui hambad ei joonda kokku. See võib tekkida ka siis, kui teil on puudu hambad, mis on veel asendada. Mõnikord hambad ei pruugi joondada tasakaalu ülejäänud nägu. Kui see juhtub, siis kannatavad ebamugavustunne nagu peavalu ja isegi kaelavalu. Te võite kannatada ka valu teistes kehaosades. Kosmeetiline kirurgia aitab seda parandada, pakkudes lahendusi, mis ravivad vale hammustuse põhjust. Võimalik, et peate oma hammaste, trakside või kroonide jaoks paigaldama spooni. Lahendused leevendavad ebamugavust, mida olete võinud kannatada. See näitab, et kosmeetiline kirurgia võib teha rohkem kui lihtsalt parandada oma välimust.<br/><br/>Tugevdab hambaid<br/><br/>Kosmeetilised hambaprotseduurid võimaldavad hambaid tugevaks ja seetõttu paremini toimida. Kui teil on purustatud hambad, siis ei näri korralikult ja see võib seetõttu põhjustada halba seedimist. Samuti ei pruugi te olla võimeline hästi toitma ja võite lõpuks alatoitunud. Lahendused, nagu kroonid, sillad ja spoonid, kaitsevad teie olemasolevaid hambaid ja samal ajal tugevdavad nõrku hambaid, võimaldades neil oma funktsiooni hästi täita. Asendades puuduvad hambad annab teile paremat teenust oma hambaid, sest asendused täita funktsiooni puuduvad hambad. Lõpus päeval, siis ei ole asendatud oma hambaid lihtsalt parandada oma naeratust, vaid ka võimaldab teil närida paremini ja anda oma näole vajaliku toetuse.<br/><br/>Parandab teie välimust<br/><br/>Halb hambaravi valem muudab kuju oma nägu. Hambad teha nii palju rohkem kui lihtsalt närimine toitu. Nad aitavad määratleda lõualuu. Nad takistavad longus ja muud ebameeldivad muutused oma nägu. Puuduvate hammaste asendamine ja teiste näo kuju häirivate probleemide parandamine parandab teie välimust. Mõned protseduurid nõuavad suu rekonstrueerimist. Mõnikord on vajalik korrigeerimine sama väike kui ühe puuduva hamba asendamine. Näete suurt erinevust, mida see teie näole teeb. Kosmeetiline hambaravi väldib lõuad ja naeratab. Sul on hea meel, et läksite protseduuridele.<br/><br/>Tehnoloogia areng on näinud erinevaid muutusi toimub hambaravi ees. Kui teil töötab hambakliinik, soovite kursis viimaseid sündmusi hambaravi valdkonnas. Te peaksite tagama, et uuendate oma hambaravi kontoris uusima hambaravi seadmed. Võttes uusim state-of-the-art hambaravi seadmed töötavad teie kasuks.<br/><br/>patsientide meelitamine ja säilitamine<br/><br/>Hambaravi patsiendid otsivad valutuid ja kiireid protseduure. Nad ei taha oodata kaua tulemusi. Traditsiooniliselt olid hambaravi protseduurid pikad, valulikud ja mitte paljud patsiendid ootasid hambaravi kontori külastust. Uued seadmed muudavad hambaarsti juurde reisimise mugavamaks. Kui teil on seadmed oma praktikas, võite olla kindel, et pakute oma patsientidele parimat alternatiivi. Te näete, et teie praktikas on patsiendid teenuste jaoks vooderdatud. Need, kes saavad uute seadmete proovid, soovivad tulevikus tagasi tulla. Kui soovite kasvatada suurepärast hambaravi, on kõige parem, et teie kliinikus oleks paigaldatud uusim varustus.<br/><br/>Suurem tootlikkus<br/><br/>Seadmega on teil rohkem tootlikkust. Saate hoolitseda paljude patsientide eest päevas, kuna seadmed muudavad protseduurid kiiremaks. See kiire teenus on kasulik oma praktikas, sest patsiendid ei pea ootama päeva lihtsalt saada oma hambaid hoolitseda. Seadmed võimaldab teil teha rohkem ühe istungi. Patsientidel ei ole vaja protseduuri järgmise sammu tegemiseks tagasi tulla. Paljudel juhtudel võib patsiendil olla äge esimene seanss ja vältida järgmist seanssi, kahjustades nende suu tervist. Valutute, stressivabade protseduuridega ei karda patsiendid teie juurde tagasi tulla. Mõned protseduurid, nagu hammaste valgendamine, muutuvad uue lasertehnoloogiaga lihtsamaks, mis annab kohe tulemusi.<br/><br/>Pakkuge täpseid ja tõhusaid lahendusi<br/><br/>Uusimad hambaraviseadmed pakuvad tõhusaid ja kauakestvaid lahendusi. Teie patsiendid ei pea kaua võitlema hambaprobleemidega. Mõned seadmed vähendavad manuaalsete rakenduste, näiteks puurimise kasutamist. Tehnoloogia teeb tööd, protsessid on täpsem, jättes vähe võimalusi inimeksimuste. Käsitsi puurimine võib kahjustada hammast veelgi, kuid kasutades tehnoloogiat nagu õhu hõõrdumist vähendab võimalusi teha vigu. Hambakaariese avastamine varases staadiumis on parim, et vältida hammaste kahjustusi. Uusimate seadmete ja tööriistade olemasolu võimaldab teil probleemi varakult lahendada ja seega hamba väljatõmbamisest päästa. Teil on hambakliiniku jaoks parim tava, kuna protsessid, nagu steriliseerimine ja muud nakkusevastased meetmed, töötavad tõhusalt.<br/><br/>Joo rohkem vett – Suvekuude jõhkra kuumusega võib vedeliku hoidmine olla üsna raske. Dehüdratsioon võib avaldada kahjulikku mõju kogu kehale. Keele ja suukuivus on dehüdratsiooni tavalised sümptomid. Naastu ja toiduosakesed loputatakse süljega, mis osalevad aktiivselt hamba lagunemise tekitamisel. Suu on suurema nakkusohuga ilma õige koguse süljeta. See võib põhjustada igemehaigusi ja hammaste lagunemist. Selleks, et tagada normaalne süljepõlv, peate juua rohkem vett.<br/><br/>Püüdke säilitada suuhügieeni - harjamine kaks korda päevas ja hambaniit on suvel sama oluline kui mis tahes muus aastaajas. Kuna jahedate hõrgutiste, nagu jäätise ja külmade jookide tarbimine on tõusnud, on ütlematagi selge, et peate paremini hoolitsema ja järgima hambahügieeni marsruuti jõulisemalt. Nii et peaksite vanadest harjadest ja hambapastadest loobuma ning minema uute juurde tõhusamate fluoriidhambapastadega, et saaksite oma suu eest paremini hoolitseda.<br/><br/>Kaitse huuled – Enne päikese käes käimist enamus teist tavaliselt ei unusta naha kaitsmiseks päikesekaitsekreemi kasutada. Kuid enamik inimesi unustab, et huulte eest tuleb võrdselt hoolitseda. Eriti oluline on kaitsta huuli päikese eest, sest huulte nahk on õhuke ja eriti haavatav melaniini puudumise tõttu. Pikaajaline päikese käes viibimine võib põhjustada suuvähki ja seetõttu peate oma huuled päikese eest kaitsma.<br/><br/>Ärge närige jääl – närimine jääl võib tunduda tõhus viis niisutada ennast. Aga see tegu tekitab tohutu kahjulik mõju oma hambaid tervist. Hambad võivad olla pragunenud, kiibistatud või katki, sest. Selle tõttu võib kahjustada ka mis tahes kosmeetiline implantaat, mida olete teinud. Kui hammas puruneb igemejoonest allapoole, tuleb hammas eemaldada. Seetõttu peaksite vältima jää jahtumist ja valima selle asemel klaasi vett.<br/><br/>Stock Up a köök, mis on tervislik – Sa ei tohiks lasta suvekuudel põhjustada happelisi rünnakuid oma suuhoolduse režiimi hävitamiseks. Sa peaksid külmkapis varuma tervislikke võimalusi, nagu värskelt kasvatatud köögiviljad ja puuviljad. Sa peaksid hoidma puu- ja köögiviljad valmis haarata ja värske, nii et lapsed saavad munt tervislikumaid suupisteid nagu maasikad ja mustikad ja mitte küpsiseid ja kiibid.<br/><br/>Maksa regulaarselt külastusi hambaarstile – Sa ei tohi jätta oma visiidi hambaarsti nende kuude jooksul, kui soovite säilitada oma suu tervist. Ta annab teile nõu võimalike ohtude ja kuidas neist eemale hoida, et sa kutsuda mingeid probleeme. Lisaks sellele võib varitseva ohu avastada ka varakult, kui lähete hambaarstiga regulaarselt kontrollima.<br/><br/>Ülaltoodud on mõned nõuanded, mida peate meeles pidama, kui soovite suvekuudel säilitada suure naeratuse ja tugeva hambaravi.<br/><br/>Kas teie kalliskivid veritsevad? Kui jah, siis see on midagi, mida te ei tohiks ignoreerida, või muidu see seisund halveneb. Kuid enne hambaarsti juurde minekut, et seda ravida, on siin mõned asjad, mida peate tõesti teadma. Nii et alustame.<br/><br/>Mida tähendab veritsev igeme?<br/><br/>Veritsevad igemed on põhjustatud ebapiisavast naastu eemaldamisest. Põhimõtteliselt on see naastu rünnak, mis sisaldab mitmeid mikroobe. Nad ründavad hammaste terveid kudesid ja kahjustavad neid drastiliselt. See verejooks, kui ei hoolitsetud, aja jooksul võib põhjustada ka põletikku kui ka ärritust. See on väga esimene etapp igemehaigus ja kui te ei soovi seda süvendada, siis tuleb seda kohe ravida.<br/><br/>Siin on, mida saate teha, et seda peatada:<br/><br/>Step Up Your Oral Care Game : Suuhooldus on oluline, et vältida igemehaigusi ja kui te võtate seda iseenesestmõistetavaks, võib see mitte ainult põhjustada igemeverejooksu, vaid ka suurendada suuõõne probleemide arvu. Seetõttu on oluline, et kõik harjata hambaid kaks korda päevas. Ka ei tohiks unustada hambaniiti või võtta õige suulise kursuse vajalik, nagu nende seisund.<br/><br/>Lülitumine tervislikule toitumisele : see, mida sa sööd, mõjutab otseselt hambaid ja selleks, et peatada igemeverejooks või mõni igemehaigus, peaksite oma dieeti parandama. Täitke oma taldrik mitmete puu- ja köögiviljadega ning andke oma igemetele toitaineid, mida see vajab, et hoida oma naeratus sära nagu ei kunagi varem. Soovitatav on suurendada C-vitamiini ja A-vitamiini tarbimist, et tagada igemete hea tervis.<br/><br/>Lõpetage jagamine : Suu tervise puhul peate lõpetama oma hambaharja, hambaniiti või veeklaasi jagamise oma partneriga, kuna igemete verejooks on nakkav. Niisiis, sa pead olema väga ettevaatlik ja lõpetage jagamine, muidu suurendab see teie partneri probleemi saamise ohtu.<br/><br/>Külasta hambaarsti : Jah, enamik inimesi vältida külastavad hambaarsti, mis on nende suurim viga, mis viib rohkem suulisi probleeme. Kui sa ei taha neid kunagi oma elu, teha õigeaegne visiit hambaarsti. See aitab teil parandada oma suuõõne tervist.<br/><br/>Need on mõned viisid, kuidas saate hoolitseda oma suu tervist. Kui te kunagi tunnete midagi ebanormaalset hambaid, veenduge, et leida parim hambaarst ümber ja külastada neid. Lõppude lõpuks, ettevaatusabinõud on alati parem kui ravi.<br/><br/>Suuõõne tervis on kriitilise tähtsusega mitmel põhjusel. See ei ole mitte ainult vastutav teile suurepärase naeratuse pakkumise eest, vaid mõjutab ka teie üldist tervist.<br/><br/>Mitmete tingimuste hulgas, mis suulise tervise on seotud nagu südameinfarkt, insult, diabeet, hingamisteede infektsioonid ja palju muud, depressioon on üks kõige olulisem neist. See on meeleoluhäire, mis mõjutab iga päev suurt hulka inimesi. See on keeruline vaimuhaigus, mida võivad põhjustada mitmed tegurid. Välistegurid hõlmavad traumaatiline elukogemus, samas kui sisemiste tegurite hulka perekonna ajalugu selle tingimuse või aju keemia või midagi muud.<br/><br/>Depressioon on üks tingimustest, mis võib muuta kogu oma elustiili. See on palju enamat kui lihtsalt tunne kurb. See ei ole ainult unehäired ja keskendumisvõime, kuid see ka huvita inimesi oma igapäevaseid majapidamistöid, nagu hoolitsedes oma suu või hammaste tervist.<br/><br/>Teisest küljest on raske periodontaalhaigus ka märkimisväärne mõju mõnele süstemaatilisele tervisehäirele ja depressioon on üks neist. See mõjutab ka suuõõne tervisekäitumist ja elukvaliteeti.<br/><br/>Peale selle on see püsiv tunne, et defektsioon ja suuõõne tervis on seotud sülje muutustega depressiooniga patsientidel. Kui süljevool väheneb depressiooni tõttu, võib see põhjustada mitmeid suuõõne terviseprobleeme, nagu hammaste lagunemise suurenemine ja muud patoloogilised terviseprobleemid.<br/><br/>Siin on mõned viisid, kuidas depressioon ja suuõõne tervis on omavahel seotud. Lihtsalt loe edasi.<br/><br/>Krooniline valu Enhancements Depressioon – See ei ole üsna haruldane, et inimesed, kes kogevad valu saada depressioon. See võib juhtuda, et üks hoidub hambaarsti ja kannatavad valu pikema aja jooksul. Mitte ainult, et see võib juhtuda, et teie suu kannatab üks probleem teise järel, kui te läbite geneetilise dispositsiooni õõnsused ja harjutanud halb suuhügieen. Sellistel asjaoludel peaksite olema teadlik ka sellest, et teil on suurem tõenäosus depressiooni tekkeks, kui teil on hambavalu pikka aega. Selle vältimiseks peate regulaarselt külastama hambaarsti.<br/><br/>Periodontaalhaiguste riski suurendab see vaimne haigus - kortisooli ringluse tase suureneb depressiooni tõttu. Sellega suureneb ka periodontaalhaiguste oht.<br/><br/>Täited võivad halvendada seisukorda - elavhõbedaga seotud metall on see, mis konstrueerib amalgaami täiteaineid. Elavhõbe on juhtumisi mürgine aine ja mõnikord võivad täiteained elavhõbedat lekkida vedeliku või gaasina. Depressioon juhtub olema üks elavhõbeda mürgistuse sümptomeid. Kuigi enamik patsiente ei esine sellist probleemi, kui teil on see vaimne seisund, siis ei tohiks seda allikana ära visata. Kui amalgaami täiteained on kulunud, tuleks need asendada komposiitmaterjalidega.<br/><br/>Temporomandibulaarsed häired, mida põhjustab depressioon – see vaimne haigus võib põhjustada temporomandibulaarset häiret, mis võib takistada lõualuu liikumist ja põhjustada valu.<br/><br/>Antidepressandid Mõjuta suuõõne tervist – Sa peaksid olema teadlikud, et ravimid vaimse seisundi nagu antidepressandid võivad põhjustada suukuivus. Tundlikult halb hingeõhk, igemehaiguste ja halb hingeõhk ka suureneb, sest. Võib-olla peate kasutama fluoriidi hambapastat ja juua rohkem vett, et seda kontrollida. Peale selle peate võtma ka ravimeid, et suurendada süljevoolu.<br/><br/>Naeratus võib aidata depressiooni kontrolli all hoida – Stressihormooni saab vähendada naeratusega sagedamini, kuna see tõstab meeleolu. Aga kui te ei ole oma naeratusega rahul, siis on vähem tõenäoline, et naeratada sageli. Hambaarst peaks olema võimeline juhendama teid, kuidas saate parandada naeratus, mis suurendab teie usaldust ja selle tulemusena sa naeratad rohkem.<br/><br/>Ülaltoodud on mõned viisid, kuidas depressioon ja suuõõne tervis on omavahel seotud. Nii et nüüd, kui sa tead, sa peaksid võtma nõuetekohase hoole oma suulise tervise ja ka vaadata depressiooni sümptomeid ja ei karda näha arsti, kui teil on tekkinud mõni neist. Nii saad elada tervislikku ja õnnelikku elu, kus saad sagedamini enesekindlalt naeratada ja maailma oma sammudes võtta. |
| The Partdiscounter Blog<br/><br/>Tires are one of the most important aspects of the automotive combustion engine because all the power in the world won't make a block of metal move. With ATVs, UTVs and Bikes there are just so many tires out there to choose from. In this blog we'll look at the choices out there and help decipher what tire's right for you.<br/><br/>When looking at tires you'll see three different numbers which state, in this order: The height, width and the size of rims these tires can be mounted on. For example let's breakdown "25-8-12," the 25 would mean these tires are 25 inches tall, the 8 inches wide and can be placed on a 12 inch rim.<br/><br/>Vehicle manufacturers match their OEM tires with the specs of the new vehicle; the engine, gearing and handling. This is why most people recommend you stay at the same size they put on. But not everyone likes to do that, some people like to buck the trend and go the performance route, really do anything, especially go against those "manufacturer suggestions" to go a little bit faster.<br/><br/>If you're looking to go outside the OEM's tire size then it's important to know size impacts your vehicle's abilities. Larger tires will increase your top speed and make for a softer ride; however there are some down sides. Larger tires will limit your ability to burst right off the starting line and if you go too big, the engine can be overloaded because it's trying to produce the energy needed to push those mammoths, and ultimately the frame, the shocks and a number of other parts will wear out early because of the size.<br/><br/>Going smaller is basically just the opposite of going bigger, it'll pick up speed faster right off the starting line, but you won't be performing as well during the race and if you go too small you'll have less control and risk damaging your vehicle.<br/><br/>The Different Types of Tires<br/><br/>Other than size, there are a variety of different types of tires that are better suited for the different environments you may find yourself in, whether that's on a trail, gliding through mud, skipping on sand or racing down a closed track.<br/><br/>Tail Tires (or All-Terrain)<br/><br/>These tires are the jack of all trades and master of none; they are decent for any terrain; however they don't exactly excel on one particular terrain over another. These tires are used when you don't want the maintenance of switching out your tires all the time, which makes up for them not being as good. If you're looking to spend most of your time in one particular environment these are not the tires for you. We suggest looking at the more specialized tires we'll be discussing below.<br/><br/>Mud<br/><br/>These tires are great for that wet and sloppy terrain whether that be mud or sticky snow. Mud tires are made to drive through the thick muck and typically have wide spaced, irregular and wide treads that disperse the mud and dirt instead of keeping it inside the tread giving you better traction in the mud. It's possible to use these tires on other terrain, but it's a rough ride and these tires will wear much quicker than in their intended environment<br/><br/>Sand<br/><br/>When riding on the sand it's easy to find yourself in a situation where you're driving up a sand dune, see the light of success, only to find your vehicle sliding on back down. Lack of traction is a crappy feeling and one that will likely replay itself over and over again until you pony up for some specialized tires. Sand tires are also referred to as paddle tires because of the paddle looking ridges on the back tires. These paddles make for a more stable ride taking away that feeling of having no control.<br/><br/>Racing<br/><br/>If you're looking to scratch that competitive itch then you should take a look at racing tires. Racing tires come in many different shapes made specifically for the medium to hard packed terrain found on most tracks. Each track is made a little different and veteran racers will know what kind of racing tire they'll need, for beginners it will take some time and some effort to figure out which tire works best for you on whatever track you're racing on. Once you get to that point you'll really appreciate the different kinds of racing tires.<br/><br/>Tires are notcheap and you'll want to keep them maintained, keep them full of air, and check them for tread or other damage. Damaged tires will fail and that could leave you stranded with no way to back. Also, remember that how you ride definitely affects the life expectancy of your tires, going fast and hammering the breaks will wear them out much faster than a slow gradual stop.<br/><br/>There's a lot of thought that goes into picking a set of tires and we hope this blog gives you a bit of clarity when making your decision. We may not sell tires at partdiscounter.com, but tires will have a massive effect on the parts we do sell. Their life and their performance are greatly influenced by the tires you put on your vehicle.<br/><br/>Have any questions about tires or want a place to inspire others to make a monster machine then leave a comment below.<br/><br/>Most riders know before winter comes that they have to begin the process of storing their vehicles for the long cold interlude between riding seasons. This involves emptying their fuel, doing one last clean and maybe a little maintenance before its stored away; however, there are some people who still brave the winter on an ATV/UTV. In this blog we'll talk about the benefits and drawbacks of using to tracks to make your vehicle an all season machine.<br/><br/>The winter, especially up here in Canada can be a cold and cruel that you don't want to be trapped in. There are less people driving around outside and a lot of places are much harder to get to if something does happen. Now you're probably thinking "okay, I don't want to be stuck, so what can I do?" Well one thing you can do is buy tracks.<br/><br/>Tires and tracks are made differently and are meant for different utilities. Wheels absorb the hits they're given because of the air inside; however tracks don't have that same luxury. They're made of a bunch of links that don't have the cushion like tires do, which means they won't take as much and are easier to break depending on how and where you ride. The reason we switch to tracks in the winter is for gaining surface area, so we can grip the snow and plow on forward where tires would otherwise be left in a rut. Tracks can also work well in the sand and mud for this same reason as well. Now, if you're goal is a winter powerhouse, tracks are not for you because they take away a lot of your middle and high-end torque, but gives you in return lots of low-end power, perfect for a winter workhorse.<br/><br/>There is another significant negative to tracks and that's their cost. Tracks cost so much money; some are in the high $3000s while others climb into the higher $5000s with some even higher than that. At such a price you're basically paying for another ATV or more likely if winter riding is important to you, a snowmobile. For speed there's no better alternative than a snowmobile in the winter, they basically own the season. If you're looking to keep moving loads back and forth or have an unbridled love for your ATV, then tracks might be right for you. These are really for the explorer at heart, the kind of person who wants to go where others have gone before, but get there in a more stylish manner in a season best tackled by a warm cup of coco.<br/><br/>The title for this blog is "Don't Let Your Vehicle Hibernate This Winter, Add Tracks and Defy the Season," but you don't necessarily need to take off the tracks depending on the brand you have and how they were designed. Tracks are great in mud like stated before and can move unstable loads because of their inherent low centre of gravity. You'll still lose a ton of top speed no matter the season, but if you want to forgo tires and just use tracks you can.<br/><br/>Tracks are one solution to the winter problem, another being a good winch to pull your vehicle out of the deceivingly deep snow. There are other solutions out there, tracks though are quite distinctive and merge tank with recreational machine. If tracks are good for the army when they go into foreign lands with varying environments, then they can be good for you too.<br/><br/>Three wheel ATVs were in their heyday back in the 70s and 80s with around 80% of all ATVs in use being three wheeled. With 20 years under their belt you would think they would keep making them well into the future but that ended up not being the case. In this blog we'll discuss the most popular three wheel ATV and why they fell from grace.<br/><br/>The most well-known model of three wheelers was Honda'sATC, which stood for All-Terrain Cycle. A term first patented in the 1970s by Honda. One of the most popular three wheelers was Honda's ATC90. Now this baby was quite the powerhouse. The ATC90 was powered by an 89cc four-stroke single-cylinder engine that pushed out a staggering 7 horsepower and was sold for $595 or around $3651.77 today. That's inflation for you.<br/><br/>So why did Honda or any other manufacturers decide to make these three-wheel vehicles? Basically, Honda tasked one of their engineers, Osamu Takeuchi to create a new product dealers could sell when motorcycle sales fell off during the winter.Looking at this from a purely economic point-of-view it's an obvious move any company would want to make, a move other manufacturers quickly followed. Unfortunately, their motives would soon come to be questioned.<br/><br/>Three wheeled Death Machines<br/><br/>By the time the 1980s were in full swing, three and four wheelATVs were being largely produced by Japanese companies and marketed in the US. Sometimes that marketing took the form of less scrupulous dealers targeting children. This, as it probably should have,caused a public outcry about and againstthese vehicles. People.com said from an article dated in 1987,<br/><br/>"In the past five years ATVshave claimed the lives of 644 Americans and injured 230,000 more, according to the Consumer Product Safety Commission. The fact that nearly 50 percent of them have been kids 16 years old and younger has prompted the American Academy of Pediatricians to call for a moratorium on ATV sales in this country, which reached 500,000 last year."<br/><br/>Since the most popular ATVs at the time had three wheels, they took the brunt of the criticism. The critics, when talking about three wheel ATVs, point out that they lack the mechanical shock absorbers and rely on their oversized tires to handle bumpy terrain. They also say that three wheeler's have a solid rear axle making it tricky to handle, especially when turning, when you need that control most of all. These vehicles also lack a differential between the two rear wheels, making the wheels turn in unison rather then moving at slightly different speeds giving the driver greater control.<br/><br/>These problems led to the bike's centre of gravity moving to the inside forcing the rider to shift his weight into each turn to avoid tipping the bike over. This means these vehicles required a certain level of skill to use and even then they were seen as pretty dangerous by researchers. The average person though walking around the show floor thought these vehicles looked perfectly harmless.<br/><br/>Men would look at these three wheelers thinking they were weak compared to what they were purchasing and perfect for their spouse or child. When you look at them it's easy to understand that thought process, they look like tricycles, the kind made to protect children from falling off their bicycles, except they are just as dangerous as their more powerful, four-wheel cousins.<br/><br/>After all this bad press the government made their move and sued the manufacturers of these vehicles leading them to be banned in 1988in order to reduce injury and death. Now people could still buy and sell used three wheel ATVs, it wasn't illegal to own them because they weren't recalled, but manufacturers could not continue to sell them. The manufacturers blamed user error, saying that people were acting unsafe especially on three wheel ATVs though relented to the pressure and agreed to stop selling them. This all culminated in the Consent Decree that was effective for 10 years and required manufacturers to:<br/><br/>Stop selling new three wheel ATVs and repurchase unsold stock from dealer inventory.<br/><br/>Promote and sell four wheeled adult-sized ATVs (i.e. those with engines of more than 90 cc or cubic centimetres)<br/><br/>Promote and sell youth-sized ATVs (i.e. for-wheeled machines with engines between 70 and 90cc) only for the use of riders 12 and older.<br/><br/>Provide free training to all ATV purchasers and their immediate families.<br/><br/>Conduct a nationwide safety public awareness media campaign<br/><br/>Adhere to guidelines for advertising and promotional materials.<br/><br/>Include specified warning on labels and in the owner's manuals<br/><br/>Develop a voluntary ATV industry standard.<br/><br/>Initially injury and deaths went down because of the disappearance of three wheelers; however, that was short lived. Four wheel ATVs grew in popularity filling in the gap left by their three wheeled cousins and so did ATV related injuries. The government doesn't seem poised to step in again despite numbers being as bad as they were before the Consent Decree, but there are great classes out there that teach ATV safety and they're one of the most important tools to have when driving ATVs.<br/><br/>Interestingly, three wheelers haven't totally gone away. ATV manufacturers like Can-am have developed the Spyder, a kind of motorcycle instead of an ATV which they say "has unmatched comfort for two riders and luxurious styling.There are also a number ofthree-wheel street legal cars, like the Campagna T-Rex.<br/><br/>We hope this goes to show that ATVs, no matter how many wheels they have, might not seem overly dangerous just by looking at them, but can be in the wrong and untrained hands. It's important tomake sure you're operating them safely and not underestimating what they can do.<br/><br/>Have any questions about three wheel ATVs or still holding on to one and want to share your experiences, let us know in the comments. If this blog inspired you to act a little on the safer side why not look at some of our aftermarket parts made and tested to last longer than any OEM partat partdiscounter.com.<br/><br/>The Banshee YFZ 350 or just Banshee 350 is a very well-known vehicle in the ATV community because of its incredible powerband that can make the rider fly right off the seat while holding on to the handlebars. The Banshee was first introduced to the US market in 1987 and sadly, for those living in the United States, regulations killed the Banshee in 2006 while it was still being built in Canada until 2008 and Australia until 2012.<br/><br/>At the 350's core resides a two-stroke engine, a kind of engine mostly extinct these days. They've almost been entirely replaced by more fuel efficient and environmentally friendly four strokes, but for those looking to know more about two-strokes, we wrote a blog post about them a little while ago.<br/><br/>Essentially, two stroke engines have two strokes, the compression stroke and the combustion stroke or power stroke, and because it only has two strokes it has a great power-to-weight ratio. This allows the rider to find the wider powerband on this vehicle very quickly.<br/><br/>Is This Vehicle for Experts Only?<br/><br/>Generally, the Banshee 350's power is why most people in forums suggest beginners avoid the Banshee and go for something like the TRX 400EX. The incredible power of the Banshee comes from something called a powerband. This means finding the sweet spot where the engine is working at its best. Four-stroke engines have a powerband as well, but they're not as distinct as a two-stroke's let alone the Banshee's. This power then makes it very easy to get hurt. This is an ATV that could pop-a-wheelie with very little trouble. Since this power is a little bit unpredictable to those who are used to riding four stroke engines it can be adangerous jumping on one of these expecting to go out and blast through everything in your path.<br/><br/>It's too bad that Banshee's are no longer manufactured though it's not like a new release every year stops anybody from taking their Banshee apart and remaking it anew. Countless Banshees have been reworked into various different shapes and sizes. Some people have made their Banshee more of a drag racer which means elongating the vehicle with the wheels far out in front. Others make theirs even more powerful then it started off as with a big bore cylinder.<br/><br/>Why Some People Hate the Banshee<br/><br/>There are people out there who are not as interested in pure power as Banshee lovers are and they tend to look for a more overall experience than just the power the Banshee 350 can offer. Some of the problems people dislike about the Banshee are:<br/><br/>In life people always say don't judge a book by its cover, well the Banshee 350 looks all around primitive though that doesn't mean the engine inside is old and tired. There's hardly anything attractive to see on this beast with its relatively flat surfaces. Makes sense since they're based off a design created in the 80s, even the newer ones, the 2000s keep that ugly look.<br/><br/>The Banshee has no oil injectors, meaning you'll have to premix your gas. This can really turn people off because it requires another step to getting your ATV out and riding. Also by premixing your own oil you can potentially put in a mixture that will damage the engine. It's not hard to premix gas there's a learning curve sure but you can also look at is as part of the experience. You can tweak the mixture until it runs exactly the way you want it to.<br/><br/>The Banshee's stock air filter tends to gobble the dirt and let it into the carburetor. This can be problematic because dirt leads to internal wear, which is why many people opt for aftermarket filters and some go so far as to put pre-filters on their vehicles. This way they have as much protection from dirt and grime as they possibly can rather than throwing gunk into your carb, then your engine.<br/><br/>Suspension is lacking. Suspension is important in any environment ATVs roam, but for trails; hitting the rocks and bumps require good suspension to protect not only the driver but the vehicle too.<br/><br/>Not as fuel efficient as its four-stroke cousins. More power, more fuel. It's definitely a trade-off that buying and mixing fuel will become a kind of well-oiled habit. Depending on how long or hard you ride you'll likely need fuel after every ride.<br/><br/>Finally, the Banshee has no reverse. Of course this more of annoyance than anything else. Don't let this stop you if you think you can handle this beast.<br/><br/>Who Typically Uses Them These Days<br/><br/>There are a lot of people out there still building and rebuilding these machines for a few reasons: It's a quirky bike which people love to adjust and modify for how they ride, the fun of the powerband and many still use these on dunes. ATVRider.com says "sand kills horsepower. And this machine has corralled horses in spades." This is probably the best line describing why Banshees have found a new life in the dunes.<br/><br/>Have any questions about the Banshee 350 or have one with some crazy mods you'd like to share, let us know in the comments.<br/><br/>The Honda TRX 400EX is a well-known entry level ATV. The kind that leads to the harder, scarier ATVs able to make tears run down your cheeks in the first second, and dry them all up in the second. You won't find that kind of power on a base model TRX400EX, but it's perfect for a beginner or someone graduating from a lower class of bike with less cc's. Now, just because some see it as an entry level ATV it doesn't mean the 400EX doesn't have lots of low end power to whip anyone around the trails and have tons of fun. In many ways though, it's a jack of all trades but master of none. People might then ask, if it's not powerful or one heck of a performer then why is it still so widely remembered in the ATV community? In this blog we'll explore that status and the 400EX's history ending with it taking a permanent place in the hearts and minds of ATV riders everywhere.<br/><br/>Why the Almost Mythical Status?<br/><br/>Word of mouth is what gives something mythical status, a status that is either good or bad; no one cares or remembers about the all-around average. Generally, weremember the bad easier than the good, which means the good we do remember has to be pretty darn great.<br/><br/>The 400EX is one of the greats, up there with the Yamaha Banshee 350. Where the Banshee has an extraordinary powerband that can almost suck the vehicle right from under your hands, the 400EX has reliability and ease of use. There is no ATV forum online that doesn't have countless topics about the 400EX and this just goes to show how popular the machine still truly is. It is without a doubt one, if not the best vehicle for longevity and user-friendliness.<br/><br/>History<br/><br/>When the 400EX first came out it was considered a really good vehicle; however, the powerful two-strokes usually kept them out of major races. And yet, whenever someone goes on a forum and asks "what vehicle should I get if I'm a beginner." The forum is always full of 400EX responses because it was made tough and durable so new riders didn't have to worry as often about costly maintenance beyond the basic oil and filter changes.<br/><br/>The Honda TRX 400EX is also well-known because of when it launched. It was the light at the end of a long and dark tunnel that stretched for 10 years until a new sport ATV came out. Sure the Banshee and Blaster were still being made, but there was no other competition, at least not until the 400EX came out. In many ways sports ATVs were smeared as dangerous toys, manufactured by companies that cared little for human life and less still for children. The biggest factor in this dark period was the Consent Decree of 1988 which held numerous requirements that immensely affected those "evil" manufacturers. Three wheel ATVs were completely banned from being manufactured and although nothing explicitly banned sport ATVs in the decree, no one really had the needed willpower to fight for their place in the industry.<br/><br/>Then we jump 10 years to 1998, It was a good year for the sport ATV enthusiast because the Consent Decree finally came to an end and sport ATVs had their sudden resurgence with the launch of the TRX 400EX.<br/><br/>In the car world, Honda Civics and Toyota Corollas are seen as invincible lackluster cars that will get you through the years from A to B without many stops at the shop and in the ATV world, the Honda TRX400EX is exactly that. They're not often raced these days because there are many more powerful vehicles out there, but that also means many of those being sold today are OEM or close to it. The 400EX also has no shortage of aftermarket parts either and aftermarket manufacturers have made it so that if you want to change something on your vehicle, you can, from big bores to suspension and axles to coolers. Nothing needs to be original if you so choose.<br/><br/>It does have a couple weaknesses, putting in mods that generate additional power means putting increased stress on the gearbox and the clutch, which have been noticeable weak points with the machine. But no machine is perfect and the benefits of owning this one outweigh the negatives.<br/><br/>With the 400EX you can truly customize it to your likes and needs. If you're looking to add some aftermarket parts to your 400EX and keep it just as reliable as before, take a tour of our 400EX section on partdiscounter.com where we have numerous OEM replacement and high performance parts waiting to make it purr or howl, depending on what you're looking for.<br/><br/>Servo motors can be found in a variety of different devices. Toys have them inside, so do DVD players, even the robotic arms used in assembly lines have them. Some servo motors are less complex than others thoughin the end they're all essentially the same thing; a self-contained electronic device that rotates or pushes parts of a device with precision.<br/><br/>In ATVs, servo motors take on the role of enabling a driver to turn their 4x4 on and off. The servo motor engages and disengages based on the position the 4x4 switch mounted on your handle bars is in.<br/><br/>Unfortunately, when a servo motor breaks the driver can run into some big problems like getting stuck in whatever mode the rider left it in before it broke. The broken motor makes it impossible to switch without some sort of repair. Likely, this repair would be replacing the entire servo motor however, there's a small motor inside an assembled servo motor that can also be replaced. This can give you back your control, but if it doesn't then you'll have to replace the entire motor.<br/><br/>Is Your Servo Motor the Problem?<br/><br/>It's very easy to automatically blame the servo motor when you're stuck in either 2x4 or 4x4 mode except, the servo motor might be perfectly fine and left as a scapegoat for another part. Electrical connectors, connecting to the servo motor and elsewhere can get dirty, which can cause it to malfunction, break down and ultimately break. If you're still suffering the former, a simple cleaning with some electrical contact cleaner can do wonders. Then you can add some dielectric grease to keep this problem from happening again anytime soon.<br/><br/>Another problem that can affect the servo motor's performance is having fuses blow in the fuse box. If this happens enough then you can be sure the servo motor will burn out too. In this case there's likely some underlying issue with the electronics that are keeping them from working as intended like frayed wires, broken connectors or other problems that would require more advanced diagnostics to find and fix.<br/><br/>Now, servo motors have a wide range of different prices, assembled, apart or relying on the failure's old bolts to still be in good condition. For example, an OEM Yamaha servo motor can cost as much as $500 and if you add labor into that it goes up even more. At partdiscounter.com we sell identical servo motors to what Yamaha sells for the Grizzly 600 and 660, but for less than half that price. We also know what our customers and those who will join us in the future are likelythinking; that OEM parts are always better because you know right away they'll fit, but we sell direct replacement servo motors. This means they follow exactly the same specifications and you won't be able to tell the difference. Our servo motors are also made to fit your factory differential and wiring harness so that you don't have to take apart too many things to get back out there.<br/><br/>Servo motors are not as interesting to deal with as performance parts that can change the entire character of your bike when installed. They are still pretty important, especially if you enjoy 4x4 driving. Getting into a tricky situation like being stuck in a rut or slippery ditch can take out any 2x4 but with a working servo motor you can just flick the switch and cruise on out of there, leaving the less fortunate in your dust. This isn't the part you want to forget about or ignore if it breaks, make sure to fix it or replaceit; otherwise you won't have access to all the features that made your vehicle so enticing when you bought it in the first place.<br/><br/>If you have questions about servo motors please let us know in comments.<br/><br/>There are three very important shafts that make a vehicle work; Camshafts, Crankshafts and Driveshafts. They're not equally important butwith or without them working properly, vehicle failure is a forgone conclusion.<br/><br/>Crankshaft<br/><br/>The Crankshaft, also known as a crank works just the way it sounds by cranking. This cranking converts the reciprocating (back and forth) motion of the piston into rotational (round and round) motion which then empowers the vehicle to move forward.<br/><br/>A Crankshaft is not the strongest part in a vehicle and can break because there's not enough lubrication, leaving it weak for debris or heat to destroy it. Crankshafts can be fixed depending on the damage, but it's pretty difficult and shouldn't be attempted by a novice mechanic. Unfortunately, Crankshafts can be really expensive, add labour into the equation and it'll make you pause to consider all of your options going forward.<br/><br/>Camshaft<br/><br/>A Camshaft, like a Crankshaft is part of the internal combustion engine and works to open and close the valves found inside. The Camshaft uses lobes or cams to push the engine valves open and the Crankshaft returns them to a closed position. The two shafts are directly coupled so the opening and closing of the valves can be timed accordingly. The Camshaft is a rotating cylindrical shaft used to regulate the injection of vaporized fuel in the engine. When a Camshaft wears out it can cause problems with idling, low compression and make your vehicle bog down (making it slower than it normally would be).<br/><br/>Driveshaft<br/><br/>The Driveshaft is the main shaft connected to the transmission on the bottom of a vehicle. The Driveshaft, sometimes also known as a propeller shaft was made to replace a chain that performed a similar function. They replaced this chain because Driveshafts are more reliable and don't require tightening to keep working their best.<br/><br/>The Driveshaft takes the torque produced by the engine into a usable moving force to propel the vehicle. Driveshafts don't commonly fail, but when they do you'll be left stranded unless your vehicle has 4x4, then you can still limp your way home. Not ideal, though it's better than being alone deep in the woods. A Driveshaft breaking can also cause other parts to break and sometimes cause important things like brake lines to be ripped or shredded depending on the make of vehicle.<br/><br/>Adding on huge tires can put massive strain on many different parts of your vehicle and the Driveshaft happens to be one of those parts. Without upgrades, the new tires will wear the Driveshaft down in very little time. The splines in the Driveshaft can be worn down and if they're worn too much they'll make it so the Driveshaft stops spinning. This can be very dangerous so make sure to check for wear and listen for noises because it could be your Driveshaft failing.<br/><br/>Who would've guessed three shafts were so important to the inner workings of a vehicle, but without them the vehicle would be a massive rock, only able to be moved by winch and another vehicle with those three shafts working together. Either way, the three shafts are essential to producing and utilizing the power generated by the engine. These three shafts are the frame of which your adventure is built on.<br/><br/>Have any questions about these three shafts please let us know in the comments. For those of you looking for one of these shafts, why not stay a while and take a look on Partdiscounter.com<br/><br/>When we buy our vehicles new they come with original parts, made specifically for that machine and when they break, we generally want to replace these parts through an authorized dealership with authorized parts; however there is another option, one that if you're reading this has already crossed your mind. Aftermarket parts are built to the specifications of the original part or built to exceed those original specs. Depending on what you need or are looking for they can also be made of a variety of different metals and compounds for added strength and performance.<br/><br/>Unlike a dealer who sells you an entire vehicle which works because of a collection of parts, Aftermarket dealers find success from the parts you buy. Repeat business and word of mouth matter to the big guys too (your Yamahas, Hondas and Polaris' to just name a few), but the vast majority of them have diversified portfolios (ATVs, UTVs, Motorcycles, Snowmobiles and sometimes Cars), while Aftermarket dealers specialize in certain vehicle types.<br/><br/>Generally, aftermarket parts exist as an alternative to dealership parts for 4 reasons: Cost, quality, convenience and performance. Without these 4 reasons dealerships would have a total monopoly on these new parts.<br/><br/>1. Cost<br/><br/>Those original parts you're looking for, they are usually grossly overpriced. Manufacturers make scads of money off parts at your expense, but they're coming from a brand name. The brand name gives you the peace of mind and feeling that this part will definitely fit in your vehicle. Basically, it's no different from buying jeans, you can spend $20 or $100 and the $100 ones should last for as long as 5 pairs of the $20 ones should, usually that's never the case. The name, like with any product, is usually what ends up being the most expensive component when buying parts.<br/><br/>The added value gained by buying aftermarket parts can also make it cheaper to diagnose problems. Parts often wear down prematurely because there's something else out of whack in the vehicle and with these cost effective parts it can be economical to buy two, sometimes three of them before they cost the same as a dealer's part.<br/><br/>2. Quality<br/><br/>Parts can break quick or slow depending on the environment they're in, the way they're maintained and finally how they're used or abused. If you're parts keep wearing out because of howyou're driving then it may be time to look at something built a little bit more solidly. We talk about the various aftermarket metals and their benefits in this post. (link) Basically, these metals move against the old adage that aftermarket parts are cheap, poorly produced and likely to fail more quickly than the manufacturers'. Just because something is less money doesn't necessarily make it cheap.<br/><br/>3. Convenience<br/><br/>We can only speak for Partdiscounter.com on this, but when we say we have the part, we do. Dealerships are not as predictable and don't always have every part you need in stock and ready to go, which can lead to ridiculously long wait times leaving you angry and jealous of all your friends who are able to ride. We make parts, that's what we do, and they're in stock-ready to ship.<br/><br/>4. Performance<br/><br/>Dealers sometimes offer big bores and some other performance parts, but there's no comparison between the variety aftermarket part sellers offer and a dealer. Aftermarket parts truly make any vehicle customizable from look and power to utility and stability, tailoring your vehicle to your needs. Farmers will likely need more power in the bottom end to tow and drag around cargo, where as a racer will likely need more medium and top end power depending on the kind of race. Based on which modifications you want, this can drastically change the performance of your machine which is sometimes vastly different from what the manufacturers had in mind.<br/><br/>In the end the choice is yours. Don't fall prey to the idea that if parts are more expensive it will save you headaches down the road. Have any favourite aftermarket modifications you've purchased or any questions about aftermarket parts? Please let us know the comments.<br/><br/>Mechanics are very expensive, the parts they use to repair the vehicle are too, but almost nothing is more expensive in repairing a vehicle than the man or women fixing it. It's for this reason so many of us like to tinker around and try to fix the problem first, and when we go to tinker we need a variety of different tools.<br/><br/>Opinions on which tools every off-roader should own to service their vehicle are like snowflakes, there are millions and all of them different. In this blog we'll be discussing our opinion on the tools you need to keep your vehicle going for the long haul.<br/><br/>Torque Wrench<br/><br/>Most bolts you'll find have specific torque settings to make sure they're tightened down fully and properly. Engine bolts, especially need very particular torqueing or these bolts willbegin to warp the part.<br/><br/>There are three styles of torque wrenches, click break and slip. The click ones are the most popular of the three and basically each describes the method in which they tell you you've achieved the pre-set torque you dialed in.<br/><br/>Drive socket set<br/><br/>6 point sockets are good because they grip a little more closely and will make stripped heads less likely. A socket's "drive" refers to the square that it uses to drive the socket. A 3/8" drive socket is the most common, but a ¼" will get you into those tight and hard to reach spaces.<br/><br/>Get a metric drive socket set and go a little on the small side. They're fantastic and easy to use with one hand. Of course it's more for small jobs, but general maintenance is just a list of small jobs. With these sockets you can exchange body plastics, adjust handlebar controls and remove jets from the carburetor. Plus, because it's smaller you'll be less likely to over tighten and destroy threads.<br/><br/>Screw Extractor<br/><br/>We've all been there, tightening or unscrewing something only to have the head snap off. It's so infuriating to have it happen, but with a screw extractor,figuring out a different way to get the bolt out or scrapping the part entirely are thoughts best left to the past. These threaded drill bits cutinto the broken bolt and drills a small hole. After drilling in you need only pull the bolt out. This is so much better than destroying everything else around it.<br/><br/>Tire Gauge<br/><br/>Tire gauges for ATVs don't work any different than for cars, but they're just as important. Tires take the energy from the engine to propel the vehicle forward and without the proper amount of air in those tires your vehicle will run sluggish. With under inflated or over inflated tires you're rapidly increasing their wear bringing them closer to failure. Manufacturers will usually give you one with their supplied toolkits, but there are other, more expensive kinds that just feel better. And on the off chance you don't have a tire gauge at all,well…what are you waiting for?<br/><br/>Blow Gun<br/><br/>When you're bouncing your vehicle around in the mud, collecting all that dirt and grim it's something you'll want to invest in. Dirt, grime and salt are the precursors to failure, because they slowlywear down and eat away at parts.<br/><br/>Flashlight<br/><br/>This one's a little on the obvious side. Whether you're just quickly looking at your vehicle at night or closely analyzing it for wear or damage, a flashlight is going to help. Don't be one of those people that say "if I can't see it, it's not there." Problems don't just go away when you ignore them, sadly. So take our word for it, there's no better diagnostic tool than a flashlight for working on an off-road vehicle or in life.<br/><br/>Gloves and Rags<br/><br/>Like the flashlight, gloves and rags are essential for any repair or maintenance. Gloves can help with a number of things. They can take the heat your skin can't, be a barrier to sharp objects, give you better grip for pulling and twisting wrenches or parts and finally keep your hands clean. Rags on the other hand are used to wipe down everything. There are so many different liquids, fluids and greases that go into a vehicle, and they all have a place they need to be; however they tend to splash around and get into or on other parts they shouldn't. You can't leave it like that, so keep some rags around and wipe off the excess.<br/><br/>Screwdrivers<br/><br/>Chances are you have a screwdriver or two kicking around somewhere; they have so many uses around the house, the same can be said for a vehicle. You'll be using screwdrivers a ton over the years so it's worthwhile to spend a decent amount of money on one. Also, if you can find a screwdriver with a hex bolster, then all the better. With this you can use a crescent wrench to get any super stuck screw out.<br/><br/>Those are some of the tools we find most important, what about you, what tool sits on top of your toolbox ready to go? Tell us in the comments below.<br/><br/>Not long ago we had a question from a customer asking us what exactly the difference is between EBS and Non- EBS clutches. In this blog we'll answer their question and explore in more depth the benefits and weaknesses of both.<br/><br/>EBS stands for engine breaking system and Polaris is the exclusive user of EBS' for better or for worse. That's not to say they're the only ones with vehicles that have engine braking, lots of other vehicles have systems that use and take advantage of it. Engine braking is great for vehicle longevity because it saves the regular braking system for those times when you really need to use them, and saves the tires from the wear that comes from traditional braking.<br/><br/>The EBS is a special type of clutch made to slow down your machine when you release the throttle. Non-EBS' are the exact opposite. As soon as you release the throttle your machine coasts freely, otherwise known as "freewheeling" and relies solely on your brakes to slow down the vehicle. The EBS is especially impressive when you're using an ATV to pull heavy loads, push snow or place the ATV under other heavy work because it makes the vehicle more stable under all that added weight.<br/><br/>Some people have problems with Polaris' EBS because of how it slows down their vehicle when they let off the gas and in some cases the rear tires can seemingly lock up when going down steep hills making it feel like they're out of control. There's a lovely quote from a member of polarisriders.com that sums up this reality, "The first couple of times, you feel like you're going to die. Then you get used to it and learn to control it." Some people love this stopping power, because it takes away that annoying process of rotating through braking and adding power to get down the hill, others not so much.<br/><br/>A fairly loud noise also accompanies the EBS when it engages which can sound like something's broken. It's a weird quirk, but you will definitely get used to it. Those are a couple of negatives compared to a bunch of positives over the Non-EBS clutches, but as always you should try and get your hands on a model with EBS to see if it's something you're going to be okay with.<br/><br/>If you don't like the way the Engine Breaking System works there are alternatives to it and ways to switch out the system, but it will cost you a good chunk of change. Just one word of advice if you're looking to go down this route, replacing the EBS isn't as simple as it might at first seem. Forums have numerous different ideas, different changes you can make to lessen the engine braking as well as some ideas for getting rid of the EBS, but the easiest route by far is buying a vehicle without it.<br/><br/>We hope this answers most of your questions about the differences between EBS and Non-EBS clutches, and as always if you any questions, let us know in the comments. | Partdiscounter Blog<br/><br/>Rehvid on üks tähtsamaid aspekte auto sisepõlemismootori, sest kogu võimsus maailmas ei tee plokk metallist liikuda. ATVs, UTVs ja jalgrattad on lihtsalt nii palju rehve seal valida. Selles blogis vaatame valikuid ja aitame dešifreerida, milline rehv on teie jaoks õige.<br/><br/>Rehve vaadates näete kolme erinevat numbrit, mis on esitatud selles järjekorras: velje kõrgus, laius ja suurus neid rehve saab paigaldada. Näiteks kui me võtame "25-8-12", siis 25 tähendaks, et need rehvid on 25 tolli pikad, 8 tolli laiused ja neid saab paigutada 12 tollisele veljele.<br/><br/>Sõidukitootjad vastavad oma OEM rehvid spetsifikatsioonid uue sõiduki; mootor, käik ja käik. See on põhjus, miks enamik inimesi soovitavad teil jääda sama suurusega nad panna. Kuid mitte kõik ei meeldi seda teha, mõned inimesed tahavad trendi ja minna jõudluse marsruudile, tõesti midagi teha, eriti minna vastu nendele "tootja soovitustele", et minna natuke kiiremini.<br/><br/>Kui otsite väljaspool OEM rehvi suurus siis on oluline teada suurus mõjutab teie sõiduki võimeid. Suuremad rehvid suurendab oma tippkiirust ja teha pehmem sõita; Siiski on mõned allapoole. Suuremad rehvid piiravad teie võimet stardijoonest otse puruneda ja kui lähete liiga suureks, võib mootor olla ülekoormatud, sest see püüab toota energiat, mis on vajalik nende mammutide tõukamiseks, ja lõpuks karastus, šokid ja mitmed muud osad kuluvad suuruse tõttu varakult.<br/><br/>Väiksemaks minemine on põhimõtteliselt lihtsalt vastupidine suuremaks minemisele, see kiirendab kiiremini kohe stardijoonelt, kuid te ei toimi sõidu ajal nii hästi ja kui lähete liiga väikeseks, on teil vähem kontrolli ja oht kahjustada teie sõidukit.<br/><br/>Erinevad rehvitüübid<br/><br/>Lisaks suurusele on olemas mitmesuguseid erinevaid rehve, mis sobivad paremini erinevatesse keskkondadesse, kus võite end leida, olenemata sellest, kas see on rajal, libiseb läbi muda, hüppab liival või võidusõidul suletud rajal.<br/><br/>Sabarehvid (või maastikurehvid)<br/><br/>Need rehvid on kõigi ametite ja mitte ühegi meister; nad on iga maastiku jaoks korralikud; kuid nad ei paista täpselt välja ühe konkreetse maastiku üle teise. Neid rehve kasutatakse siis, kui te ei soovi rehvide väljalülitamise hooldust kogu aeg, mis kompenseerib, et nad ei ole nii head. Kui soovite veeta suurema osa oma ajast ühes konkreetses keskkonnas, ei ole need teie jaoks rehvid. Soovitame vaadata rohkem spetsialiseeritud rehve, mida me allpool arutame.<br/><br/>Muda<br/><br/>Need rehvid sobivad suurepäraselt märjale ja lohakale maastikule, olgu selleks siis muda või kleepuv lumi. Muda rehvid on valmistatud sõitma läbi paksu muda ja tavaliselt on lai, ebakorrapärane ja lai turvisemuster, mis hajutab muda ja mustuse asemel hoida seda turvisemuster annab teile parema haarduvuse muda. Neid rehve on võimalik kasutada ka teistel maastikel, kuid see on karm sõit ja need rehvid kuluvad palju kiiremini kui nende kavandatud keskkonnas.<br/><br/>Liiv<br/><br/>Liival sõites on lihtne leida end olukorras, kus sõidad liivaluidet, näed edu valgust, vaid leiad oma sõiduki libisedes tagasi alla. Veojõu puudumine on kohutav tunne ja see, mis tõenäoliselt kordab ennast uuesti ja uuesti, kuni ponite mõne spetsialiseeritud rehvide jaoks.
